headline: 龙族领跑，痴迷紧随，娱乐热点今日聚焦
headlineEn: Dragon Clan Leads, Obsession Follows: Entertainment Hotspots Today
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《权力的游戏前传：龙族》与《痴迷》持续霸榜，本周多部新片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'House of the Dragon' and 'Obsession' dominate the charts, with several new films poised for release this week.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《火遮眼》热度攀升
industryHighlights.en: This week's new film 'Fire in the Eyes' gaining traction

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人：炼狱》持续吸引恐怖片粉丝
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead: Purgatory' continues to attract horror fans
'The Silo' enters this week's trending list
